chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Present: Mr. Justice Omar Sial Mr. Justice Miran Muhammad Shah Const. Petition No. D - 3852 of 2025 [Imran Ibrahim vs. Province of Sindh & Others] For Petitioner: Mr. Irshad Ali Jatoi, advocate For Respondents: Mr. Moazam Ali, Special Prosecutor NAB: Mr. Dur Muhammad Shah, Assistant Attorney General.: Mr. Muhammad Kamran Khan, Assistant Advocate General Date of hearing: 21.10.2025 Date of Order: 21.10.2025 ORDER Omar Sial, J: Learned counsel submits that the controversy has already been resolved by a Division Bench of this Court in C.P. No. D-6372 of 2021 as well as in C.P. No. 1409 of 2021. In terms of both orders passed in these petitions, respondents were directed to act as if there is no restriction anymore in terms of section 23. Section 23 of the NAO 1999 was deleted from the books by virtue of the 2022 NAB Amendment. The petitioner too is entitled for the same relief. Order accordingly. Petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE
